dashboard.platformDesc: Real-time intelligence across your ML model lifecycle — factories, algorithms, versions, and performance.
dashboard.iterativeAnalysisSub: Select and compare performance metrics between two versions
dashboard.activityLogSub: Real-time event stream across your factories

factoryList.reportFail: Failed to generate report. Please try again.
factoryList.description: Manage your high-level infrastructure clusters and pipeline nodes.
factoryList.noFactoriesSub: Try adjusting your filters or create a new cluster.
factoryList.noSummary: No summary provided for this factory.
factoryList.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete
factoryList.deleteDescWarning: This action will permanently remove all associated algorithms and models.
factoryList.removeConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to remove
factoryList.removeConfirmWarning: This will delete all models and versions for this algorithm at this factory. Other algorithms will not be affected.
factoryList.removeFail: Failed to remove factory. Please try again.
factoryList.dashboardDesc: Comprehensive algorithm overview, version progression, and comparison across all deployed factories.
factoryList.noDashboardDataSub: Once model versions are uploaded and metrics are populated inside factories, this algorithm dashboard will display comparative line and bar charts.

factoryOverview.reportFail: Failed to generate report. Please try again.
factoryOverview.defaultDesc: Operational edge node and hardware virtualization factory pipeline.
factoryOverview.matrixSub: active and candidate model versions evaluated by size (MB) and accuracy (%)
factoryOverview.livePipelinesSub: Active edge-inference pipelines and live resource metrics
factoryOverview.activateToStart: Activate a model version in the roster below to start edge inference and live telemetry tracking.
factoryOverview.physicalDeployment: Physical deployment of algorithm structures running on edge nodes
factoryOverview.noAlgosRegistered: No algorithms registered in this factory yet.
factoryOverview.recentActivitySub: Live audit stream of registered model versions inside this factory
factoryOverview.noRecentActivity: No recent model activity recorded yet.

algorithmList.subtitle: Manage high-level architectural blueprints and view their associated production models.
algorithmList.noDescription: No description provided for this algorithm.
algorithmList.noAlgorithmsDesc: This factory is empty. Get started by creating your first algorithm architecture.
algorithmList.deleteWarning: You are about to delete {{name}}. This will orphan all associated models and experiments. This action cannot be reversed.

modelList.subtitle: Manage specific model implementations and track their version history.
modelList.noDescription: No description provided for this model instance.
modelList.noModelsDesc: Get started by adding your first model implementation to this algorithm.
modelList.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? All associated versions and experiments will be lost.

modelOverview.noDataSub: Register a version with metrics to see trends
modelOverview.registerVersion: Register a version with metrics to see trends
modelOverview.versionAnalyticsSub: Track how metrics evolve across registered versions
modelOverview.evaluationPerformanceSub: Accuracy, precision, recall & F1 score over versions
modelOverview.resourceConsumptionSub: CPU & GPU utilization and inference latency
modelOverview.trainingParametersSub: Batch size and epoch configuration per version
modelOverview.defaultDesc: Detailed analysis of model performance metrics and iteration convergence.

versionTimeline.description: Track evolution, metrics, and manage production rollbacks.
versionTimeline.noVersionsSub: This model hasn't been iterated yet.
versionTimeline.deleteLiveWarning: This version is currently LIVE. Deleting it will impact production stability.
versionTimeline.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to remove this iteration? This action is permanent.
versionTimeline.highRiskAction: ⚠️ High Risk Action: Active Model Deletion
versionTimeline.rollbackDescription: This will set Version {{number}} as the Active Production Model. All new inference requests will be routed to this version.
versionTimeline.productionChangeDesc: Ensure downstream services are compatible with this version's input/output schema.

versionDetails.noNotes: No specific notes provided for this model iteration.
versionDetails.chooseDataLayers: Choose the data layers to include in the generated archive.
versionDetails.deleteArtifactWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.

artifactBrowser.noRepositoriesDesc: Create your first knowledge repository to start organizing artifacts and documentation.
artifactBrowser.noDescriptionAvailable: No description available for this repository.
artifactBrowser.deleteAreYouSure: Are you sure you want to delete
artifactBrowser.deletePermanent: This action is permanent and will remove all uploaded documents.

algorithmCreate.title: New Algorithm Blueprint
algorithmCreate.subtitle: Define a high-level blueprint for physical factory nodes.
algorithmCreate.namePlaceholder: e.g. Worker Fall Detection, Safety Helmet Detection
algorithmCreate.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose and primary logic of this algorithm...
algorithmCreate.tipText: Algorithms act as the architectural blueprint. Under the blueprint, you select a factory to train or configure models.
algorithmCreate.failedCreate: Failed to create algorithm. Please try again.

factoryCreate.title: Create New Factory
factoryCreate.subtitle: Establish a new production environment for your models.
factoryCreate.namePlaceholder: e.g. Neural Hub East, Silicon Valley Cluster
factoryCreate.descPlaceholder: Briefly explain the purpose of this production facility...
factoryCreate.tipText: Factories act as root containers for your specific MLOps workflows.
factoryCreate.failedCreate: Failed to create factory. Please try again.

modelCreate.title: Initialize New Model
modelCreate.subtitle: Create a specific model instance under your chosen algorithm blueprint.
modelCreate.descPlaceholder: Describe the objective, base architecture, or specific use-case...
modelCreate.tipText: Models represent actual deployments or specific versions of your algorithms.
modelCreate.failedCreate: Failed to create model. Please try again.

versionCreate.title: Commit
versionCreate.subtitle: Register a new iteration with optimized weights and updated datasets.
versionCreate.baseInheritanceDesc: Optionally inherit dataset images and labels from a previous version of this algorithm (from any factory) to avoid uploading them again.
versionCreate.stageFiles: Stage folder or files for upload
versionCreate.modelVariantsHint: You can upload multiple model variants (fp32, fp16, ONNX, etc.)
versionCreate.codeFilesHint: Include all scripts, header files, and configuration files required for training.
versionCreate.noCustomParams: No custom parameters added. Click "Add Parameter" to include more.
versionCreate.summaryPlaceholder: What changes were made in this iteration? (e.g., Improved lighting augmentations)

algorithmArtifact.emptyDesc: Use the upload button above to start adding assets.
algorithmArtifact.downloadBundleDesc: Select the categories to include in the ZIP archive.

fileUploadDialog.dragDropHelp: Drag and drop folders/files here to avoid security popups, or use the buttons below.
fileUploadDialog.dragDropSubtitle: Quickly stage multiple artifacts at once

versionCompare.noParamChanges: No parameter changes detected across these versions.
versionCompare.datasetGallerySub: Visualizing artifact changes between selected versions

versionEdit.subtitle: Precision metadata management and production artifact versioning.

versionEdit.performanceMetricsSub: Update evaluation results from the latest benchmark.
versionEdit.hyperparametersSub: Refine the operational parameters for this model version.

versionEdit.promoteToProductionSub: Activating this version will set it as the primary candidate for live inference.
